name: Saint's Overload
additional_info: Increases your Attunement investment scaling by 15% and the effects of your Mantra modifiers by 10% for a few seconds after performing a full rotation of Saint stances. You'll need to fully cycle through all of the Stances before you can proc this effect again.
desc: After a full rotation of stances your elemental scaling is increased by 15% and Mantra Modifiers increased by 10%.
